items.title: Jeff Knox leads the Jones Cup Senior Invitational after Round 1
items.why: On Feb 25, 2026 (2026-02-25): Jeff Knox is leading the Jones Cup Senior Invitational after Round 1.

items.title: Mid-Am rankings update: Gasparilla Invitational now counts toward the rankings
items.why: On Feb 25, 2026 (2026-02-25): the rankings update today, with the Gasparilla Invitational now being counted toward the rankings as the spring schedule ramps up.

items.title: HJGT upcoming schedule
items.why: On Feb 25, 2026 (2026-02-25): Hurricane Junior Golf Tour has a busy slate coming up, including Bears Best Junior Open (Mar 7–8), College Prep Series at Louisville (Mar 7–8), and Hilton Head Junior Open (Mar 7–8).

items.title: Brian Thompson wins the Arizona Southern Amateur at Tucson National
items.why: On Feb 24, 2026 (2026-02-24): Brian Thompson went 70–71 (141, -3) over Feb 21–22 to win the Arizona Southern Amateur at Tucson National.

items.title: Jones Cup Senior Invitational runs Feb 23–26 at Sea Island
items.why: On Feb 24, 2026 (2026-02-24): the Jones Cup Senior Invitational is underway this week at Sea Island (Seaside Course), with the field set following Monday’s 18-hole qualifier for three spots.

items.title: AJGA boys rankings: current top 5
items.why: On Feb 24, 2026 (2026-02-24): the top 5 in the AJGA boys rankings are Miles Russell (2027), Tyler Mawhinney (2026), Giuseppe Puebla (2027), Jessy Huebner (2027), and Luke Colton (2026).

items.title: Pacific Grove City Championship: Jerry Ledzinski closes with 64 to win
items.why: Jerry Ledzinski turned a tight Sunday into a runaway with a closing 6-under 64 to take the 2026 Pacific Grove City Championship. On Feb 23, 2026 (2026-02-23).

items.title: Jones Cup Senior Invitational kicks off this week
items.why: On Feb 23, 2026 (2026-02-23): the Jones Cup Senior Invitational runs Feb 23–26 at Sea Island (Seaside Course), and it includes an 18-hole qualifier today (Monday) for three spots in the field.

items.title: AJGA: new Junior All-Star event set for June 15–18, 2026
items.why: On Feb 23, 2026 (2026-02-23): AJGA announced a new Junior All-Star event debuting June 15–18, 2026 at Phillips Park Golf Course.

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational: live scoring + results
items.why: On Feb 22, 2026: Hayes Brown won the Mid-Am at Palma Ceia after closing with 68 (67–73–68, -2). Brown's closing 68 was a tone-setter on the final day — the kind of early-season win that travels when the mid-am calendar turns into qualifiers and invitationals.

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational: live scoring + results
items.why: On Feb 22, 2026: Jeff Frazier won the Senior division with rounds of 73–73–74. In the senior flight, three steady rounds is the blueprint — avoiding a blow-up day mattered more than chasing a single low round.

items.title: Rapid City set to host American Junior Golf Association championship
items.why: On Feb 22, 2026: AJGA’s Rapid City championship is now officially on the calendar (multi-year), a useful “save the date” for families planning late-summer travel.

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational: live scoring
items.why: On Feb 21, 2026: after Round 2, Christian Cavaliere leads at 2-under (69–69). Winburne Hughes (71–68), Brandon Holtz (70–69), and Payne Denman (73–66) are one back at 1-under, with the final round set to decide it today.

items.title: Asterisk Talley defends Fortinet Stanford Invitational title with five-shot win
items.why: On Feb 21, 2026: Talley’s repeat win is another data point for how quickly the top junior pipeline is stacking proven winners before the spring/summer major amateur calendar ramps.

items.title: 2026 U.S. Senior Open Qualifying Hub: Sites, Dates, Eligibility & How to Advance
items.why: On Feb 21, 2026: this is the practical roadmap for senior competitive schedules right now—sites/dates plus eligibility—so guys can plan travel and peak weeks instead of scrambling when entries open.

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational: Round 2 live leaderboard
items.why: On Feb 20, 2026: Round 2 is in progress at the 71st Gasparilla Invitational (Palma Ceia). After Round 1, Logan Blondell and Hayes Brown shared the lead at 67 (-3), with Christian Cavaliere 69 (-1) close behind.

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational: event hub
items.why: On Feb 20, 2026: the event continues today (pairings, updates, and links out to scoring/coverage).

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational Round 1: live scoring
items.why: On Feb 19, 2026: Round 1 is live for the 71st Gasparilla Invitational — this is the link to keep open all day as the event gets underway.

items.title: Rapid City set to host American Junior Golf Association championship
items.why: On Feb 10, 2026, AJGA announced a three-year partnership bringing an AJGA championship to Rapid City (Golf Club at Red Rock) through 2028, with the 2026 event set for Sept 2–6.

items.title: Society of Seniors: entries open (Tutwiler 4‑Ball / Senior Masters / Founders Cup)
items.why: As of Feb 19, 2026, entries are open for upcoming Society of Seniors events — a good reminder that senior season is already moving into the spring four-ball stretch.

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational: field finalized + tournament starts Thursday
items.why: On Feb 18, 2026, Gasparilla posted its finalized field list, and the Invitational kicks off Thursday (Feb 19, 2026). This is the official roll call before play begins.

items.title: AJGA announces inaugural Chicago Junior All-Star Championship
items.why: On Feb 18, 2026, the AJGA announced an inaugural Chicago Junior All-Star event debuting June 15–18, 2026 at Phillips Park Golf Course. Another concrete new date to add to the summer junior calendar.

items.title: Senior division context
items.why: On Feb 18, 2026: Gasparilla week includes a senior division, so it’s not just a mid-am storyline.

items.title: 71st Gasparilla Invitational Monday Qualifier: results
items.why: Final (Feb 16, 2026): The Monday qualifier for the 71st Gasparilla Invitational wrapped with low numbers, and Andrew Morris earned medalist at -7 (63). Qualified — Winburne Hughes -6 (64); Adam Condello -4 (66); Steve Cerbara -3 (67). Alternates — Trey Kidd (Alt 1) E (70); Peyton White (Alt 2) E (70); Joseph Trim (Alt 3) E (70); Robert Lutomski (Alt 4) E (70).

items.title: AJGA Simplify Boys Championship at Carlton Woods: final leaderboard
items.why: Final (Feb 13–16, 2026): Grayson Baucom won the AJGA Simplify Boys Championship at Carlton Woods at -12 (204) with rounds of 70-67-67. Key numbers: T2 (-9 / 207) — Jackson Ormond; Cameron Kuchar; Miles Russell.

items.title: Picard Cup: applications open (2026)
items.why: The Picard Cup has its 2026 dates posted (Aug 13–14, 2026 at Canterbury Golf Club; Pic-Am Aug 12), and applications are open.

items.title: Gasparilla Invitational week: Monday qualifier live scoring
items.why: For mid-ams, the Monday qualifier is the chance to play their way into the event. (No extra links in-body — keeping the card link as the single source.)

items.title: Gasparilla 2026 scoring hub (live scoring / pairings)
items.why: This is the canonical live link for the week. We’ll use it for daily updates so readers aren’t bouncing through old “qualifier” pages from prior years.

items.title: AJGA Simplify Boys Championship at Carlton Woods: final day scoring watch
items.why: This one wraps today. Cameron Kuchar is currently leading at -11, so the question is whether he can close or if someone in the chase pack makes a run.

items.title: Society of Seniors Spring Classic (Aileron): Mallon wins Senior Division
items.why: Final results: William Mallon won the Senior Division at 6-under 210 (three straight 70s), holding off Todd Doss (3-under 213). This is the type of early-season win that usually sets up a strong run once the schedule fills up.
